creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pkubaj
Date: Wed Jul 22 22:03:48 UTC 2020
New revision: 542896
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/542896

Log:
  sysutils/rovclock: fix build on aarch64, armv6, armv7, mips, mips64, powerpc64

  Probably other architectures are also fixed but only those are marked broken.

  machine/pio.h is necessary for outl().

  PR:		248170
  Approved by:	portmgr (blanket: build fix (multiple archs))
  MFH: 		2020Q3 (blanket: build fix (multiple archs))

Changes:
  head/sysutils/rovclock/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rovclock/files/patch-rovclock.c
